raw_title: Breadth Without Depth—A Practitioner's Observation on Default‐Mode AI
title_en: Breadth Without Depth—A Practitioner's Observation on Default‐Mode AI
title_zh: 广度无深度——从业者对默认模式AI的观察
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章是一位从业者对默认模式AI的观察，指出当前AI虽然应用广泛（广度），但在深入理解和处理复杂问题方面存在不足（缺乏深度）。
plain_summary_en: This article is a practitioner's observation on default-mode AI, pointing out that while current AI is widely applied (breadth), it lacks depth in understanding and handling complex issues.
research_direction_zh: 人工智能的实用性与局限性分析
research_direction_en: Analysis of AI practicality and limitations
